component.name: graceful-response
component.description: Help Spring Boot web application responses gracefully!

components.name: spring-boot-starter-web
components.description: Starter for building web, including RESTful, applications using Spring MVC. Uses Tomcat as the default embedded container

components.name: spring-boot-starter
components.description: Core starter, including auto-configuration support, logging and YAML

components.name: spring-boot-starter-logging
components.description: Starter for logging using Logback. Default logging starter

components.name: snakeyaml
components.description: YAML 1.1 parser and emitter for Java

components.description: Starter for reading and writing json

components.name: jackson-databind
components.description: General data-binding functionality for Jackson: works on core streaming API

components.name: jackson-annotations
components.description: Core annotations used for value types, used by Jackson data binding package.

components.name: jackson-core
components.description: Core Jackson processing abstractions (aka Streaming API), implementation for JSON

components.name: jackson-datatype-jdk8
components.description: Add-on module for Jackson (https://github.com/FasterXML/jackson) to support JDK 8 data types.

components.name: jackson-datatype-jsr310
components.description: Add-on module to support JSR-310 (Java 8 Date & Time API) data types.

components.name: jackson-module-parameter-names
components.description: Add-on module for Jackson (https://github.com/FasterXML/jackson) to support introspection of method/constructor parameter names, without having to add explicit property name annotation.

components.name: spring-boot-starter-tomcat
components.description: Starter for using Tomcat as the embedded servlet container. Default servlet container starter used by spring-boot-starter-web

components.name: spring-boot-starter-validation
components.description: Starter for using Java Bean Validation with Hibernate Validator

components.name: hibernate-validator
components.description: Hibernate's Jakarta Bean Validation reference implementation.

components.name: classmate
components.description: Library for introspecting types with full generic information including resolving of field and method types.

components.description: Starter for testing Spring Boot applications with libraries including JUnit Jupiter, Hamcrest and Mockito

components.name: json-path
components.description: A library to query and verify JSON

components.name: assertj-core
components.description: Rich and fluent assertions for testing in Java

components.name: awaitility
components.description: A Java DSL for synchronizing asynchronous operations

components.name: opentest4j
components.description: Open Test Alliance for the JVM

components.name: mockito-core
components.description: Mockito mock objects library core API and implementation

components.name: byte-buddy-agent
components.description: The Byte Buddy agent offers convenience for attaching an agent to the local or a remote VM.

components.publisher: Joe Walnes, Henri Tremblay, Leonardo Mesquita
components.name: objenesis

components.name: jsonassert
